title: lindsaea borneensis
intro: Lindsaea borneensis, also known as the Borneo Tree Fern or Lindsaea fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lindsaeaceae. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. The herbal preparation of Lindsaea borneensis typically involves drying and powdering the plant parts, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or as a poultice for topical application.
